chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SSTRA No. 108 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 15.01.2026. Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, advocate for applicant. This reference is pending since 2018 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. On 08.05.2019 following order was passed:- “08.05.2019 Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, advocate for applicant. 1. Granted, subject to all just exceptions. 2. Learned counsel for the applicant requests for time to reframe the proposed questions. Two weeks’ time is allowed to do the needful.” Today, after almost seven years later, learned counsel merely seeks adjournment for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
